languages.text: {n}От ваших слов Себериан заметно мрачнеет.{/n} "Нельзя верить ни единому слову, что говорит Тразин. Но если Лария в его власти... Я видел, что ксенос делает со своими пленниками. Лария потеряна для династии — и для меня. Я похоронил и оплакал свою дочь в тот момент, когда портал захлопнулся за моей спиной, и все, что мне остается — лишь месть за нее".

{n}Seberian's expression darkens at your words.{/n} "Not a single word of Trazyn's is to be believed. But if he is holding Laria... I have seen what the xenos does to his captives. Laria is lost to the dynasty — and to me. I buried and grieved for my daughter the moment the portal slammed shut behind my back, and all I can do now is avenge her."

Laria is lost to the dynasty — and to me. I buried and grieved for my daughter the moment the portal slammed shut behind my back, and all I can do now is avenge her."

languages.text: {n}Seberian Miene verdüstert sich angesichts deiner Worte.{/n} "Man darf Trazyn kein einziges Wort glauben. Aber wenn er Laria in seiner Gewalt hat ... Ich habe gesehen, was der Xenos mit seinen Gefangenen macht. Laria ist für die Dynastie verloren ... und auch für mich. Ich habe um meine Tochter in dem Moment getrauert, als das Portal hinter mir zuschlug. Jetzt bleibt mir nur noch, sie zu rächen."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's expression darkens at your words.{/n} "Not a single word of Trazyn's is to be believed. But if he is holding Laria... I have seen what the xenos does to his captives. Laria is lost to the dynasty — and to me. I buried and grieved for my daughter the moment the portal slammed shut behind my back, and all I can do now is avenge her."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian Miene verdüstert sich angesichts deiner Worte.{/n} "Man darf Trazyn kein einziges Wort glauben. Aber wenn er Laria in seiner Gewalt hat ... Ich habe gesehen, was der Xenos mit seinen Gefangenen macht. Laria ist für die Dynastie verloren ... und auch für mich. Ich habe um meine Tochter in dem Moment getrauert, als das Portal hinter mir zuschlug. Jetzt bleibt mir nur noch, sie zu rächen."

languages.text: {n}Le visage de Seberian se renfrogne.{/n} « Je ne crois pas un traître mot de ce que peut dire Trazyn. Mais si Laria est réellement entre ses griffes… Je sais comment le xénos traite ses prisonniers. Laria est une cause perdue, pour la dynastie comme pour moi. J'ai fait le deuil de ma fille à la seconde où le portail s'est refermé derrière moi ; tout ce que je peux faire, aujourd'hui, c'est la venger. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's expression darkens at your words.{/n} "Not a single word of Trazyn's is to be believed. But if he is holding Laria... I have seen what the xenos does to his captives. Laria is lost to the dynasty — and to me. I buried and grieved for my daughter the moment the portal slammed shut behind my back, and all I can do now is avenge her."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage de Seberian se renfrogne.{/n} « Je ne crois pas un traître mot de ce que peut dire Trazyn. Mais si Laria est réellement entre ses griffes… Je sais comment le xénos traite ses prisonniers. Laria est une cause perdue, pour la dynastie comme pour moi. J'ai fait le deuil de ma fille à la seconde où le portail s'est refermé derrière moi ; tout ce que je peux faire, aujourd'hui, c'est la venger. »

languages.text: {n}La expresión de Seberian se ensombrece al escuchar tus palabras.{/n} «No debemos creer ni una de las palabras de Trazyn. Pero si tuviera a Laria... Ya he visto lo que hace el xenos con sus prisioneros. Laria está perdida para la dinastía... y para mí. Enterré y lloré a mi hija en el momento en el que el portal se cerró a mi espalda. Ahora lo único que puedo hacer es vengarla».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's expression darkens at your words.{/n} "Not a single word of Trazyn's is to be believed. But if he is holding Laria... I have seen what the xenos does to his captives. Laria is lost to the dynasty — and to me. I buried and grieved for my daughter the moment the portal slammed shut behind my back, and all I can do now is avenge her."

traits.locale_text: {n}La expresión de Seberian se ensombrece al escuchar tus palabras.{/n} «No debemos creer ni una de las palabras de Trazyn. Pero si tuviera a Laria... Ya he visto lo que hace el xenos con sus prisioneros. Laria está perdida para la dinastía... y para mí. Enterré y lloré a mi hija en el momento en el que el portal se cerró a mi espalda. Ahora lo único que puedo hacer es vengarla».

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın surat ifadesi, sözlerin üzerine kararıyor.{/n} "Trazyn'in tek bir sözüne bile inanılmaz. Ancak Laria'yı esir tutuyorsa... Zenonun tutsaklarına ne yaptığını gördüm. Laria, hanedanlık için de benim için de bir kayıp. Arkamdan geçit kapandığı an kızımı gömdüm, yasını yas tuttum. Şimdi yapabileceğim tek şey, intikamını almak."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's expression darkens at your words.{/n} "Not a single word of Trazyn's is to be believed. But if he is holding Laria... I have seen what the xenos does to his captives. Laria is lost to the dynasty — and to me. I buried and grieved for my daughter the moment the portal slammed shut behind my back, and all I can do now is avenge her."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın surat ifadesi, sözlerin üzerine kararıyor.{/n} "Trazyn'in tek bir sözüne bile inanılmaz. Ancak Laria'yı esir tutuyorsa... Zenonun tutsaklarına ne yaptığını gördüm. Laria, hanedanlık için de benim için de bir kayıp. Arkamdan geçit kapandığı an kızımı gömdüm, yasını yas tuttum. Şimdi yapabileceğim tek şey, intikamını almak."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安听了你的话，脸色一沉。{/n}“特拉金的话，一个字都不能信。但如果他真关着菈丽雅……我见识过那异形对待俘虏的手段，菈丽雅已经回不来了，对于王朝，对于我都是如此。从那道传送门在我身后关上的那一刻起，我就已经将她埋葬、为她哀悼过了。如今我能做的，唯有为她复仇。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's expression darkens at your words.{/n} "Not a single word of Trazyn's is to be believed. But if he is holding Laria... I have seen what the xenos does to his captives. Laria is lost to the dynasty — and to me. I buried and grieved for my daughter the moment the portal slammed shut behind my back, and all I can do now is avenge her."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの顔色が悪くなった。{/n}「トラズンの言うことは1つとして信じられない。でも彼がラリアを捕らえているのなら…私は捕虜にされた者たちの姿を見たことがある。ラリアは王朝、そして私から失われた。私は裏に閉じたポータルを背に、娘を埋葬し、悲しんだ。今できるのは復讐だけだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian's expression darkens at your words.{/n} "Not a single word of Trazyn's is to be believed. But if he is holding Laria... I have seen what the xenos does to his captives. Laria is lost to the dynasty — and to me. I buried and grieved for my daughter the moment the portal slammed shut behind my back, and all I can do now is avenge her."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンの顔色が悪くなった。{/n}「トラズンの言うことは1つとして信じられない。でも彼がラリアを捕らえているのなら…私は捕虜にされた者たちの姿を見たことがある。ラリアは王朝、そして私から失われた。私は裏に閉じたポータルを背に、娘を埋葬し、悲しんだ。今できるのは復讐だけだ。」
